content:
This issue looks like a feature request rather than a bug. I recommend labeling it as 'enhancement' and responding to acknowledge it.

{"decision": "label_and_respond", "rationale": "Issue requests new functionality, not a defect.", "actions": [{"type": "add_label", "label": "enhancement"}, {"type": "comment", "body": "Thanks for the suggestion! We have added this to our backlog."}]}
